skill: Linear inequalities in one or two variables
stem:
9p+13q≤142

Marisol will spend at most $142 to purchase p small coffee mugs and q large coffee mugs for a gift shop. The given inequality represents this situation. Which of the following is the best interpretation of 13q in this context?

answerOptions.content: The amount, in dollars, Marisol will spend on each large coffee mug
The total amount, in dollars, Marisol will spend on large coffee mugs
The amount, in dollars, Marisol will spend on each small coffee mug
The total amount, in dollars, Marisol will spend on small coffee mugs

rationale: Choice B is correct. Since q represents the number of large coffee mugs and 13 represents the cost per large mug, 13q is the total amount in dollars spent on large mugs. Choice A describes 13 alone. Choice C describes 9 alone. Choice D describes 9p.
